name: Pathmark Local App Windows
label: Fragmented shopping checklist
release_notes: Keeps shopping-list taps local to a Streamlit fragment and saves checked items to Pathmark Sync only when the user presses Save shopping changes.
notes: Shopping-list interaction now runs inside a Streamlit fragment where supported, so taps should not rerun the whole Pathmark app.
Checking and unchecking items still moves them between To buy and Completed immediately in the session.
Pathmark Sync is updated only when Save shopping changes is pressed.
Save shopping changes now writes all pending checked-state changes in one Google Sheets batch update.
